## Checklist
- [ ] Tests passing (`python3 tests/test_atrophy.py && python3 tests/test_atrophy_llm.py`)
- [ ] Test added for the change (TDD)
- [ ] No personal data / personal paths in the diff
- [ ] Knob marked `# ponytail:` if threshold/heuristic
- [ ] Privacy respected (aggregates only, local LLM)
